content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all changed files: engine.rs preflight functions, policy.rs new helper methods, config wiring in domain.rs and config.rs, diagnostics integration, and three new tests. The core fix correctly routes the final-review planner through resolve_final_review_planner_target instead of the generic Planner role. Fallback chain, config resolution, diagnostics, and backward compatibility are all sound. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
